heading: Unsworn declarations under penalty of per­jury
label: 1746 Unsworn declarations under penalty of per­jury
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1746 was renumbered .section 1745 of this title

children.text: If executed without the United States: “I declare (or certify, verify, or state) under penalty of perjury under the laws of the United States of America that the foregoing is true and correct. Executed on (date).(Signature)”.

If executed within the United States, its territories, possessions, or commonwealths: “I declare (or certify, verify, or state) under penalty of perjury that the foregoing is true and correct. Executed on (date).(Signature)”.
